def negative_python_perf_layer_io_operations_read_entire_file_for_line_processing():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_io_operations_read_entire_file_for_line_processing"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: I/O operations. Flag read()/readlines() on files that are processed line by line."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
